item.title: Hubble vs. Webb
item.description: Southern Ring Nebula (NGC 3132) Webb is amazing. What a time to be alive. Note: it's not a competition, just a comparison. Hubble opened the door that Webb has gone through.

item.title: I’m exhausted
item.description: Shouting into the void. I was an educator for a decade in design. I have so many skills ranging from graphic design, exhibition design, ux/ui design, and human centered design. I have lead huge projects and mentored hundreds of humans around the world. I even have a TEDtalk. And yet I can’t even get a real human to look at my CV. I just want to work again. I want to make money and have health insurance again. If you read this far. Thank you. Shout out to you all. Love you Imgur. Thanks for the laughs and keeping me up with the world.
item.dc:creator: neoswhiterabbitt

INSANE in THE BRAIN.....TOTALLY MENTAL. MALIGNANT NARCISSIST = DANGER

item.title: Moskowtiz holds up huge photo of Plumpie with his buddy, Epstein At Hearing; Plumpie Scopes out children at town hall where he was hiding during debates he was too afraid to face, again.
item.description:
Source: https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-jeffrey-epstein-photo-displayed-congress-jared-moskowitz-1859617
Source: https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-complimenting-good-looking-children-raises-eyebrows-1859697 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO

item.title: AOC calls out Nancy Mace on braggadocio and deception re: her serving on a civil rights sub-committee. Sounds sweet.
item.description: Nancy Mace using flowery words takes great pride in the civil rights sub committee she served on under Jamie Raskin. AOC points out that all of Nancys flowery words cover up the fact that Nancy disbanded the civil rights sub committee
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon!
